nasb.text: They had breastplates like breastplates of iron; and the sound of their wings was like the sound of chariots, of many horses rushing to battle.

esv.text: they had breastplates like breastplates of iron, and the noise of their wings was like the noise of many chariots with horses rushing into battle.

cnv.text: 牠們的胸甲像鐵甲，牠們翅膀的聲音好像許多馬車奔馳上陣的聲音。

ccb.text: 胸前有甲，如同铁甲，鼓动翅膀时声音如同千军万马奔赴战场。

csbs.text: 它们有护胸甲像铁甲；它们翅膀的声音像许多马匹的战车奔驰出战的声音；
